final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a social media cover announcing GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart platform, targeting Xiaohongshu audience.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover aesthetic, clean minimalist design with bold typography
Composition: diagonal layout with dynamic tension, main text angled 15-30 degrees from bottom-left to top-right, ample negative space
Subject: bold headline typography featuring "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as focal points, modern sans-serif typeface
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient or solid premium color field with subtle texture, no clutter
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting, sophisticated and confident mood
Color palette: high-contrast pairing of deep charcoal or navy base with vivid accent (electric coral or acid green), pure white for secondary text
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2", "Lovart"
Constraints: must work as 3:4 vertical cover format; text must remain legible at thumbnail size
Avoid: busy backgrounds, drop shadows on text, generic stock imagery, multiple fonts, low contrast combinations
